All checks complete — here's the full end-to-end QA report for the landing page.

# 🧪 Landing Page E2E QA Report — chat.ivxholding.com
**Date:** 2026-07-12 · **Bundle:** `entry-1223d12e…js` · **Backend commit:** `1079211d`

## 1. Availability & Performance — ✅ PASS
| Check | Result |
|---|---|
| Landing page HTTP | **200 OK** in 0.21s |
| Cache headers | `max-age=0, s-maxage=300` — no stale bundle risk |
| Bundle deployed | 13.2 MB, last-modified today 23:23 UTC (latest deploy with Gender field) |
| Backend `api.ivxholding.com` | **healthy**, boot 23:22 UTC |

## 2. Routes — ✅ 5/5 PASS
`/` · `/auth` · `/auth?mode=signup` · `/landing` · `/legal` — all return **200**.

## 3. Content Integrity (verified in live bundle) — ✅ PASS
- "Invest. Build. Grow." ✓ · "256-bit" ×3 ✓ · "Privacy Protected" ✓
- All 7 roles present (incl. "Tokenized Investor", "JV Partner") ✓
- "Date of Birth" ×6 ✓ · "Gender" + "Prefer not to say" ✓ (latest feature live)

## 4. Color Palette — ✅ PASS
- IVX colors live: `#FFD700` ×91, `#00C48C` ×86, `#4A90D9` ×76, `#FF4D4D` ×52
- Landing, auth card, project card: **0 legacy colors**
- ⚠️ Minor note: `#D4AF37` appears only in `investor-pitch.tsx` (pitch-deck accent, not the landing page — intentional styling, no action needed)

## 5. Live APIs Behind the Landing — ✅ PASS
| Endpoint | Result |
|---|---|
| Video feed `/api/ivx/video-platform/feed` | **200** — deal videos returned |
| Public AI chat `/api/public/chat` | **200** in 1.6s — real answer about IVXHOLDINGS returned |

## 6. Code Health — ✅ PASS
TypeScript: **0 errors** across the Expo app.

## Verdict: 🟢 PRODUCTION READY — 6/6 sections pass, no blockers.
